title: No Block Particles
body:
## No Block Particles - A pack that removes most block particles for 1.8+.  
**For 1.9-1.12.2 use the 1.12 one. For 1.13-1.18 use the 1.18 one. Ignore the version warning.**  

### This should be compatible with most resource packs.  
But players using packs with custom block models need some patch to work:  
- Replace every "particle": ".*" to "particle": "block/particle" in every file in assets/minecraft/models/block in the other packs, then place this pack at bottom for all block particles to be hidden. Otherwise this pack may not work on those custom-modeled blocks, or custom models from other packs may stop working.
